providers.seedEvidence: connection, server version, schema, row-count, query-plan and cancellation trace
providers.execution: real SQL Server container or approved server; record image/version, credential source reference, connection diagnostic stages, DDL/DML/audit and cancellation evidence

providers.seedEvidence: connection, server version, schema, row-count, query-plan and cancellation trace
providers.execution: real MySQL container or approved server; record image/version, credential source reference, connection diagnostic stages, DDL/DML/audit and cancellation evidence

providers.seedEvidence: connection, server version, schema, row-count, query-plan and cancellation trace
providers.execution: real PostgreSQL container or approved server; record image/version, credential source reference, connection diagnostic stages, DDL/DML/audit and cancellation evidence

providers.seedEvidence: fixed sandbox database path, file hash, SQLite version, schema, row-count and cancellation trace
providers.execution: real sandboxed SQLite file; record resolved path, approval audit, file/schema/row-count hashes, DDL/DML/audit and cancellation evidence

boundary.providerLayer: database syntax, metadata and driver differences only
boundary.applicationService: permission, plan, risk, transaction, audit and business decisions
boundary.sqlitePath: tenant/application sandbox or explicit approval audit

requiredEvidence: connection diagnostic split by network, TLS, authentication, database, permission and capability
catalog snapshot including schema, table/view, columns, keys, indexes, checks, triggers and comments
SchemaChangePlan with SQL preview, risk, affected-row estimate and rollback/compensation
typed DML with primary-key/version or original-value optimistic concurrency
read-only and controlled-write query execution with timeout, cancellation and row limit
immutable audit record with redacted details and trace id
external provider container image/version, credential reference and reproducible seed hash

externalGate.reason: This workspace has no Docker executable and no ASTERERP_TEST_*_CONNECTION environment variables; no external provider result is claimed.
externalGate.policy: Missing or unreachable real provider is reported as Blocked; mocks, anonymous 401 responses and placeholder Pass are prohibited.
